zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Kirkpatrick於1441年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本時，她的父親Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick62歲，母親Lady Margaret Somerville44歲。她於1472年與Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年之後在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Kirkpatrick于1441年出生在苏格兰度福利爾可洛本时，她的父亲Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick62岁，母亲Lady Margaret Somerville44岁。她于1472年与Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年之后在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Kirkpatrick was born in 1441, in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick, was 62 and her mother, Lady Margaret Somerville, was 44. She married Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) in 1472, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1478, in Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Kirkpatrick est née en 1441, à Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Somerville, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) en 1472, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1478, à Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland: Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Kirkpatrick 1441 in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick 62 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Somerville 44. Sie hat 1472 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1478 in Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Kirkpatrick è nata il nel 1441 nel Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Somerville, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) nel 1472, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1478, nel Dumfries and Galloway, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrickが1441年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアクロセブルンで生まれた時，父Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrickは62歳，母Lady Margaret Somervilleは44歳であった。1472年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでRoger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年以後にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイで死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Kirkpatrick(이)가 1441년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 클로세번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Somerville(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1472년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Kirkpatrick nasceu em 1441, em Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Somerville, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) em 1472, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1478, em Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

ro.Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland: Dumfries and Galloway, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Kirkpatrick родилась в 1441 г. в местности клосебурн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Somerville, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) в 1472 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1478 г. в местности думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Kirkpatrick nació en 1441, en Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Ivan Thomas de Kirkpatrick, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Somerville, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Roger Kirkpatrick Grierson (Chief, 4th Feudal Lord of Lag) en 1472, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1478, en Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
